CIPHER.383.cipherString: The next decade is likely to be a period of growing instability... which could undermine... scientific progress...
CIPHER.383.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Peter Turchin encrypted as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.383.author: Peter Turchin

CIPHER.378.cipherString: In all of living, have much fun and laughter. Life is to be enjoyed, not just endured.
CIPHER.378.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Checkerboard encoded quote by Gordon B. Hinckley with a polybius key of SCREAMING. What does it say?
CIPHER.378.author: Gordon B. Hinckley

CIPHER.367.cipherString: Soy muy educado por naturaleza, incluso las voces en mi cabeza se dejan terminar sus frases.
CIPHER.367.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Graham Parke in Spanish, encoded in a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.367.author: Graham Parke
CIPHER.367.translation: I'm very polite by nature, even the voices in my head let each other finish their sentences.

CIPHER.382.cipherString: Paradise is for those who control their anger.
CIPHER.382.question: Your Bunsen burner's flame suddenly spelled this Fractionated Morse message by Koran. You are told that the quote starts with PARAD. What does it say?
CIPHER.382.author: Koran

CIPHER.377.cipherString: The Future ... is like a puzzle -- with missing pieces -- difficult to read, and never, NEVER, what you think.
CIPHER.377.question: You uncover this encoded note tucked behind a microscope slide. It's a quote, written in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?

CIPHER.370.cipherString: History is written by the victors ... except on Wikipedia haha
CIPHER.370.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Baconian puzzle reveals an interesting observation. What does it say?
CIPHER.370.author: Wikipedia

CIPHER.375.cipherString: I said I liked being half-educated; you were so much more surprised at everything when you were ignorant.
CIPHER.375.question: Your lab partner's retainer case suddenly clicked open to reveal this Aristocrat-encrypted quote by Gerald Durrell using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.375.author: Gerald Durrell

CIPHER.364.cipherString: Mankind was not needed to bring order to the world.
CIPHER.364.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Daniel Quinn, encoded as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.364.author: Daniel Quinn

CIPHER.360.question: Your science fair project logs contain a mysterious string of letters. It's a strange phrase, encoded with a Cryptarithm. What do the values 92965 67318 314200204 decode to?

CIPHER.380.cipherString: Some things are more important than following the rules. Aren't they?
CIPHER.380.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Django Wexler, written in a Porta using a keyword of LAVISH. What does it say?
CIPHER.380.author: Django Wexler

CIPHER.371.cipherString: In short, as critical as it is for us to speak up as individuals, our real power emerges when we act collectively.
CIPHER.371.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote by Tessa Khan, encrypted as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.371.author: Tessa Khan

CIPHER.372.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote, written in a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 704 4586 123469 decode to?

CIPHER.368.cipherString: Whatever word or action you send to the Universe, you'll receive it back. Choose wisely.
CIPHER.368.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Anoir Ou-chad, encoded with a Complete Columnar. The quote has ACTION somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.368.author: Anoir Ou-chad

CIPHER.379.cipherString: Everything makes sense a bit at a time. But when you try to think of it all at once, it comes out wrong.
CIPHER.379.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Aristocrat quote by Terry Pratchett. What does it say?
CIPHER.379.author: Terry Pratchett

CIPHER.369.cipherString: In a way these threats motivate me. They have given my voice more legitimacy.
CIPHER.369.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Ayaan Hirsi Ali, encrypted with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of BLUEPRINT. What does it say?
CIPHER.369.author: Ayaan Hirsi Ali

CIPHER.361.cipherString: I'm all about change, and I know things are going to move forward in life, and that's just how it goes.
CIPHER.361.question: Found inside a dissected frog's stomach (plastic, don’t worry): this Aristocrat note by Kid Rock using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.361.author: Kid Rock

CIPHER.374.cipherString: Truth uttered before its time is always dangerous.
CIPHER.374.question: You came across the following written on a wall in a cave. You are told that it's a quote by Mencius encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of MAINLY and Polybius key of COMPLAINER. What does it say?
CIPHER.374.author: Mencius

CIPHER.373.cipherString: Effective communication is the compass of leadership, guiding the way to collective success.
CIPHER.373.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this Aristocrat string by Felecia Etienne. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE twice.  What does it say?
CIPHER.373.author: Felecia Etienne

CIPHER.359.cipherString: It is risky not to take calculated risks in life.
CIPHER.359.question: Your lab partner discovered this pattern on the back of a graphing calculator. It's a quote by Gift Gugu Mona, encoded as a Baconian. You are told that the deciphered text starts with IT IS. What does it say?
CIPHER.359.author: Gift Gugu Mona

CIPHER.358.cipherString: There is no great invention, from fire to flying, which has not been hailed as an insult to some god.
CIPHER.358.question: You intercepted this transmission from a rogue weather balloon. Decode the Aristocrat version of J. B. S. Haldane's famous words. You are told that the cipher contains the word TO twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.358.author: J. B. S. Haldane

CIPHER.357.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote by Heroides, written using a Hill Cipher with a keyword of REND. What does it say?
CIPHER.357.author: Heroides

CIPHER.381.cipherString: Everyone in society should be a role model, not only for their own self-respect, but for respect from others.
CIPHER.381.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Aristocrat encoded quote by Barry Bonds using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.381.author: Barry Bonds

CIPHER.376.cipherString: Search others for their virtues, and thyself for thy vices.
CIPHER.376.question: Your school-issued Chromebook's login screen hijacked itself with this Complete Columnar quote from Fuller. The quote has THEIR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.376.author: Fuller

CIPHER.365.cipherString: Every race and every nation should be judged by the best it has been able to produce, not by the worst.
CIPHER.365.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by James Weldon Johnson, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.365.author: James Weldon Johnson

CIPHER.362.cipherString: The more we are in harmony with nature the more human we become.
CIPHER.362.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by John Moolachira encoded with a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of FARMS and Polybius key of CHEMISTRY. What does it say?
CIPHER.362.author: John Moolachira

CIPHER.363.cipherString: Challenges are what make life interesting and overcoming them is what makes life meaningful.
CIPHER.363.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Joshua J. Marine, written as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains what twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.363.author: Joshua J. Marine

CIPHER.366.cipherString: Is it surprising that modern English land law should resemble a chaos rather than a system?
CIPHER.366.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Edward Jenks, written as a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has ENGLISH somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.366.author: Edward Jenks
